technologies.name: React
technologies.description: Component-based UI library for building dynamic, highly responsive web interfaces.
technologies.why_us: We architect scalable React applications with clean state management, modular components, and performance optimizations that keep TTI (Time to Interactive) low.

technologies.name: Next.js
technologies.description: The React framework for production. Server-rendered by default for incredible performance and SEO.
technologies.why_us: Our default choice for web platforms. We leverage Next.js App Router, SSR, and ISR to build lightning-fast, highly ranked applications.

technologies.name: Tailwind CSS
technologies.description: Utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom designs without leaving your HTML.
technologies.why_us: We use Tailwind to build pixel-perfect, highly maintainable design systems that scale without CSS bloat.

technologies.name: TypeScript
technologies.description: Strongly typed programming language that builds on JavaScript to catch errors early.
technologies.why_us: Every line of code we write is strictly typed. This eliminates entire classes of runtime bugs and makes large codebases vastly easier to refactor and maintain.

technologies.name: Node.js
technologies.description: Asynchronous event-driven JavaScript runtime designed to build scalable network applications.
technologies.why_us: We build non-blocking, high-throughput APIs using Node.js, Express, or Hono to power real-time apps and complex backends.

technologies.name: Python
technologies.description: Versatile, high-level programming language dominating the data science and AI ecosystems.
technologies.why_us: Our go-to for AI integration, data pipelines, and heavy computational backends using Django or FastAPI.

technologies.name: Go
technologies.description: Statically typed, compiled language known for extreme performance and concurrent processing.
technologies.why_us: We use Go when microsecond latency and high concurrency are non-negotiable requirements.

technologies.name: Flutter
technologies.description: Google's UI toolkit for building natively compiled applications for mobile from a single codebase.
technologies.why_us: Our flagship mobile framework. We build beautiful, fluid iOS and Android apps in half the time and cost of dual-native development.

technologies.name: React Native
technologies.description: Framework for building native apps using React.
technologies.why_us: We use React Native to leverage existing web engineering skills while delivering truly native mobile experiences.
use_cases: Apps integrating with existing React codebases

technologies.name: Kotlin
technologies.description: Modern, expressive programming language for Android development.
technologies.why_us: When you need deep hardware integration or maximum Android performance, we build natively with Kotlin.

technologies.name: Swift
technologies.description: Powerful and intuitive programming language for iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, and watchOS.
technologies.why_us: For premium, Apple-ecosystem-first experiences, we build natively with Swift and SwiftUI.

technologies.name: Google Gemini
technologies.description: Google's highly capable, multimodal AI models.
technologies.why_us: We deeply integrate Gemini's multimodal capabilities (text, image, audio) and long context windows to build next-generation AI features.

technologies.name: Claude API
technologies.description: Anthropic's family of AI models focused on safety, steerability, and long context.
technologies.why_us: We leverage Claude for complex reasoning tasks, code generation, and analyzing massive documents accurately.

technologies.name: LangChain
technologies.description: Framework for developing applications powered by language models.
technologies.why_us: We use LangChain to orchestrate complex AI workflows, chain prompts, and connect LLMs to your private data sources.

technologies.name: Groq
technologies.description: The LPU Inference Engine providing blazing fast AI speeds.
technologies.why_us: When AI response time matters, we use Groq to deliver near-instantaneous LLM inference for real-time voice and chat applications.

technologies.name: RAG & Vector Search
technologies.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation using vector databases to ground AI in your private data.
technologies.why_us: We build robust RAG pipelines that prevent hallucinations, ensuring your AI assistants give accurate answers based only on your company's knowledge base.

technologies.name: PostgreSQL
technologies.description: The world's most advanced open source relational database.
technologies.why_us: Our default choice for complex relational data. We design highly normalized schemas and optimize queries for scale.

technologies.name: MongoDB
technologies.description: Document-based, distributed database built for modern application developers.
technologies.why_us: We use MongoDB for flexible, schema-less data structures and high-volume data ingestion.

technologies.name: Firebase
technologies.description: App development platform backed by Google.
technologies.why_us: We leverage Firebase for blazing fast MVPs, rock-solid authentication, and real-time database synchronization.

technologies.name: Turso (libSQL)
technologies.description: Edge-hosted distributed SQLite database.
technologies.why_us: We use Turso for edge computing architectures, ensuring your data is always close to your users for ultra-low latency.

technologies.name: AWS
technologies.description: The world's most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform.
technologies.why_us: We architect secure, scalable, and highly available infrastructures on AWS, optimizing for both performance and cost.

technologies.name: Microsoft Azure
technologies.description: Cloud computing platform with deep enterprise integration.
technologies.why_us: We deploy on Azure for clients with existing Microsoft ecosystems, ensuring seamless enterprise compliance and integration.

technologies.name: Google Cloud
technologies.description: Suite of cloud computing services offered by Google.
technologies.why_us: We leverage GCP for its world-class data analytics, machine learning tools, and global network performance.

technologies.name: Cloudflare Workers
technologies.description: Serverless execution environment running on Cloudflare's global network.
technologies.why_us: We build APIs and middleware on Cloudflare Workers to achieve 0ms cold starts and run code milliseconds away from your users.

technologies.name: Docker
technologies.description: Platform for developing, shipping, and running applications in containers.
technologies.why_us: We containerize every application we build to ensure absolute consistency between development, staging, and production environments.

technologies.name: WordPress
technologies.description: The world's most popular content management system.
technologies.why_us: We build custom, highly optimized WordPress themes and plugins, often running it as a headless CMS powered by a Next.js frontend.

technologies.name: Shopify
technologies.description: Leading global commerce company providing trusted tools to start, grow, market, and manage a retail business.
technologies.why_us: We build custom Liquid themes, private apps, and full headless Shopify storefronts for high-volume merchants.

technologies.name: WooCommerce
technologies.description: Customizable, open-source e-commerce platform built on WordPress.
technologies.why_us: We build highly customized WooCommerce architectures for businesses that need total control over their e-commerce data and checkout flows.

technologies.name: Headless CMS
technologies.description: Content management systems that separate the backend content repository from the frontend presentation layer.
technologies.why_us: We implement Sanity, Contentful, and Strapi to give marketing teams total control without sacrificing engineering performance.
